description_long: This is a modern, multi-level house with a flat roof and a clean, geometric design. The structure features large windows, multiple outdoor terraces, and landscaped garden areas, including a small lawn and patio furniture. The front includes a driveway with two carports, a main entry door, and a stairway leading to the upper level. The rear and side yards are enclosed by low walls and contain greenery, a trampoline, and outdoor seating. The house is finished in white and gray tones, with some wooden accents on fences and terraces. The overall layout is open and spacious, with a focus on outdoor living and natural light.
description: A modern, multi-level house with flat roofs, large windows, and landscaped outdoor areas, including carports and terraces. The design features clean lines, white and gray finishes, and wooden accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing the driveway, two carports, main entry, and a glimpse of the upper terrace and garden.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the large windows, outdoor trampoline, and extensive garden and patio areas.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with lawn, patio furniture, and wooden fencing, as well as the upper terrace.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the flat roof, window arrangement, and the enclosed side yard with greenery.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entry with a simple door, adjacent steps, and a covered carport; minimalistic and functional with no ornate features.
